title: Mera Haque
subTitle: A young hooligan who looks exactly like a murdered prince is taken to the palace and made to impersonate him. Schemes, however, go sideways as the young man seems to have plans of his own.

title: Ardh Satya
subTitle: Anant, a righteous police officer, is torn between his ethics and dishonest practices in the police department. Soon, he discovers the strong connection between corruption and politics.

title: Painter Babu
subTitle: After an unexpected blow to his father's business, Shyam, who loves Renu, is forced to marry Menaka. Unhappy with the decision, he becomes a rebel and invites more troubles in his life.

title: My Life My Story
subTitle: The host invites prominent Bollywood celebrities who open up about their personal life and share interesting anecdotes based on their experiences.

title: Seema
subTitle: Gauri, an orphan, leads a miserable life and soon gets falsely accused of theft. However, her life changes when she lands in a reformatory run by Ashok, a compassionate man.

title: Heer Ranjha
subTitle: Heer, who belongs to a rich family, and Ranjha, a poor farm boy, fall madly in love with each other. But, their lives take a tragic turn when Heer's parents forcibly marry her off to a wealthy man.

title: Amardeep
subTitle: Raja, an arrogant man, is in love with his servant's daughter, Radha. He is enraged to find that she loves Kishan, so he hatches a devious plan to get them married and then keep them apart.

title: Humjoli
subTitle: Gopaldas, a villager, dreams of becoming rich and, thus, marries Roopa, an heiress. However, his greed knows no bounds when he plots Roopa's murder to inherit her property.

title: Khilona Bana Khalnayak
subTitle: Tatya Vinchu, a dying gangster, transfer his soul into a doll. The ventriloquist Lakshya unknowingly brings the sinister doll into his life, leading to chaos.

title: Andheri Raat Mein Diya Tere Haath Mein
subTitle: Two friends join the underworld to make money and to lead a comfortable life. Later, they realise the ill-effects of crime and want to lead a normal life.

title: Andheri Raat Mein Diya Tere Haath Mein
subTitle: Two friends join the underworld to make money and to lead a comfortable life. Later, they realise the ill-effects of crime and want to lead a normal life.

title: Priyatama
subTitle: Despite having made the difficult decision to separate, Dolly pretends to love her husband when her father comes to visit.

title: Shiv Sati Vivah
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: My Life My Story
subTitle: The host invites prominent Bollywood celebrities who open up about their personal life and share interesting anecdotes based on their experiences.

title: Dastaan-E-Rafi
subTitle: Renowned celebrities discuss the life journey of gifted singer Mohammed Rafi, sharing moments and incidents they experienced with him during his career.

title: Aap Ke Deewane
subTitle: Forced to become college dropouts, childhood friends Ram and Rahim put on quirky disguises to get hired as home tutors for a wealthy and sheltered woman. As they spend time with her, a love triangle starts taking shape.

title: Gopal Krishna
subTitle: King Kansa claims the throne of Mathura and kills off his nephews to prevent his death at one of their hands. However, the eighth child is whisked off to safety and grows up as Krishna.

title: Tyagi
subTitle: Shankar, a good man, takes the blame when one of his brothers is accused of a murder. However, when he returns from jail, he realises that his brothers are trying to create a rift in the family.

title: Parichay
subTitle: Desperate for work, Ravi takes up the challenge of teaching five spoilt children who have driven away all previous tutors. However, they soon bond and Ravi falls for Rama, the eldest of the lot.

title: Coolie
subTitle: Seema, the daughter of a wealthy businessman, falls in love with a labourer. However, complications arise when Seema's father refuses to accept their relationship.

title: Phir Teri Kahani Yaad Aayi
subTitle: Rahul falls in love with Pooja who is mentally unstable but she is sent to an asylum where she dies in a fire. Her memories keep haunting him as he is unable to get over her.

title: Phir Teri Kahani Yaad Aayi
subTitle: Rahul falls in love with Pooja who is mentally unstable but she is sent to an asylum where she dies in a fire. Her memories keep haunting him as he is unable to get over her.

title: The Gold Medal
subTitle: The Gold Medal is a 1969 Hindi spy film starring Jeetendra, Rakhee Gulzar, Shatrughan Sinha. Labor leader Acharya is murdered. During investigation, Secret Services comes to know about a dangerous gang working against the interest of the country.

title: Ek Musafir Ek Hasina
subTitle: A runaway bride meets a charming stranger and falls in love with him while tending to his wounds. However, when the man meets with an accident leading to amnesia, he completely forgets her.

title: Teri Maang Sitaron Se Bhar Doon
subTitle: Kamini pretends to be wealthy in front of her daughter, while living a contradictory reality. However, her life takes a surprising turn when her boss, an outlaw named Sultanbhai, comes to her rescue.

title: Apne Apne
subTitle: Ravi gets married to Sharda against his mother's wish. However, when Sharda suffers a miscarriage and leaves Ravi, he marries Seema, a rich woman.

title: Maang Bharo Sajana
subTitle: Chandra, a college student, loves Gita and wishes to marry her. When Gita's father discovers this, he rejects his proposal claiming that Chandra is not the biological son of his mother Sita.

title: Itihaas
subTitle: Naina, who is betrothed to an influential man, falls in love and elopes with Karan, the son of an employee of her fiance. Soon, bounty hunters start hunting the duo to claim a hefty reward.

title: Dushman
subTitle: Surjit Singh, a truck driver, kills a man while driving in the thick fog. However, his life changes when the judge sentences him to serve the victim's family.

title: Izzat
subTitle: Constable Ram Chandra teaches his son Siddharth to be a diligent policeman and lead his life with honesty and dignity. Siddharth follows his advice until circumstances force him to leave his ideals.
